tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT_FALLBACK strategy):
  Uniform drift of 5.4pt across all 3 columns.
  Root cause unclear (cell padding and table indent do not match drift).
  Fix: reduce Table.LeftIndent by 5.4pt (108 twips).
  This shifts the entire table left as a unit — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Verify: Table.LeftIndent in source .docx = 0pt. New value should be -5.4pt.

WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT strategy):
  Root cause: Table.LeftIndent changed from -10.15pt to -4.75pt between versions.
  Fix: set Table.LeftIndent to -10.15pt (-203 twips).
  Apply ONCE per table — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Note: table has negative indent (intentional margin positioning).
